mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.notification_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, customer_id, customer_name, channel, template_id, subject, body, recipient_address, sent_at, delivered_at, failure_reason, retry_count, state_id ) SELECT n.id, n.tenant, NOW(), n.customer_id, COALESCE(u.first_name || ' ' || COALESCE(u.last_name, ''), ''), n.channel, n.template_id, n.subject, n.body, n.recipient_address, n.sent_at, n.delivered_at, n.failure_reason, COALESCE(n.retry_count, 0), n.state_id FROM hm_notification.notifications n LEFT JOIN hm_user.user_profiles u ON n.customer_id = u.id
